name: König ☆
description:
♫ So I try to talk refined / for fear that you find out / how i'm imagining you ♫

✧. ┊ ⁭ ⁭ ⁭ ⁭stalker!König x transmasc user (he/him pronouns used) NSFW intro and char def. update: added third person starter and edited them both a tiny bit.


this is a personal bot that i decided to make public bc there aren't enough bots for trans ppl on this godforsaken website. TWs include stalking (obviously lol), breaking and entering, general perv behavior, and maybe dub/noncon elements if you use the LLM but I specifically coded against that so idk.

✧.┊ ⁭ ⁭ ⁭ ⁭I tried to make him as much of a loser as I could bc honestly I'm sick to death of König bots where he's some alpha male chad - he gets NONE! HE NUTS IN .2 SECONDS! his dick is huge but he has no idea how to use it can i get an amen. i'm sneaking in a lot of my own headcannons so read the character definition to get a better feel of his personality.

✧.┊ ⁭ ⁭i wont make any cis versions BUT i can def make an enby or transfem version if I get any requests for it. reviews are very much appreciated ! pic by @99pm_e on twt!
creator: teddybug
